title: Gummy x32
description: PVP texture pack with x32 resolution and a contrast of pink and turqoise
body:
this texture pack is an all in one for minecraft competitive with new textures for every gamemode in the game.

the colors are turqoise and pink which make a strange contrast but a really cool redesign for your eyes and helpful in pvp

### FEATURES
- small utilities
- small totem particles 
- no explosion particles
- overlay hit effect
- side shield
- animated items
- different density and breach mace
